documentation: Loads current public key to clipboard.

documentation: Sign a message with the current private key. Produces base64 signature.

functions.name: stability_matrix_tools.keys.verify
documentation:
Verify a message with the current public key. Expects base64 signature.
Optionally supply a different public key to use.
